name: Server & Storage Infrastructure
description: Enterprise server and storage solutions including rack servers, blade systems, hyper-converged infrastructure, SAN/NAS storage, and backup appliances. Bechtle designs, supplies, and installs data center hardware tailored to customer workloads.
target_audience: Data center teams, IT infrastructure managers
differentiators: Certified partnerships with all major server/storage OEMs
Capacity planning and architecture design included
Integration with managed services for ongoing operations
